title: From Classic to Core Solidity - Kamil Sliwak
description:
Classic Solidity has to go. Core Solidity is the future. Will users follow? Can Solidity avoid repeating the infamous decade-long migration that Python 3 experienced?

Kamil Sliwak from Solidity | Argot Collective shared just how 'breaking' the changes will really be and what can be done in the compiler to give users a smooth, gradual transition.
